title: The Permission to Spend
content: [soft laugh] You want to know one of the hardest parts of my job? [pause] Giving people permission to spend. [pause] I worked with a couple - call them Maria and Larry - who had over three million dollars saved. No chance they'd run out of money. Ever. But Maria couldn't bring herself to touch it. She'd worked so hard to build that nest egg. [pause] The most valuable advice I gave them? Rent a vacation home this summer. Invite the grandkids. [pause] [emotional] She called me after that trip. Said it was the best week of her life. [pause] Sometimes the math shows you can afford to enjoy your money. The hard part is believing it.
follow_up: Our research showed that encouraging them to spend 10% more actually INCREASED their financial security. Lower costs, better strategies - all that value they were leaving on the table by being too conservative.
lesson: Sometimes the best financial advice is permission to enjoy your life.
